comment: The services provided were sprinkler inspection and repair and laying of Amerishade St. Augustine grass/sod. Very professional and honest. Had interactions with several different parties during the course of the work and all were courteous, thorough and polite.
draft_response: We appreciate you taking the time, Alice. Your feedback on the lawn care service is exactly the kind of detail that helps us maintain the Black Hill Standard across every property. Thank you for choosing Black Hill Landscaping.
